title: SENIOR AND COMMUNITY CENTER SERVICES - 211info
text: HARNEY COUNTY HARNEY HUB SENIOR AND COMMUNITY CENTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides utility assistance for gas, electric, and heating fuel bills; motel vouchers; one-time gas vouchers; transportation passes; food pantry (visit twice per month); Fresh Alliance program (provides fresh produce, dairy, and bread products); weatherization services; and blood pressure screenings. Offers snack kits. Assistive medical equipment and mobility aids also available. 17 S Alder Street Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: -Food pantry: Households at or below 300% federal poverty level. No proof of income is required. -Fresh Alliance: Unrestricted -Snack kits for those looking to keep moving through the community -Motel vouchers: Homeless individuals requiring one night's stay -Gas vouchers: Must be stuck and looking to continue to move through the community -Transportation passes: Must have no ties to the community and looking to continue to move through the community -Energy Assistance: Household must meet federal poverty guidelines Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Fresh Alliance: Monday 10am-10:30am Food pantry: Wednesday 10am-1pm, Thursday 4pm-6pm Email (541) 573-6024 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 573-6024 Main phone Main phone (541) 573-6024 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Blood Pressure Screening Electric Service Payment Assistance Food Pantries Fresh Food Gas Money Gas Service Payment Assistance General Medical Equipment/Supplies Provision Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Homeless Motel Vouchers Transportation Passes Walking Aids Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HARNEY COUNTY HARNEY HUB
